Free calculator · 60 seconds

Content output calculator.

How much more content could your team ship with AI? Adjust your team size, current output per format, and AI capture rate. The calculator estimates AI-enabled monthly output and the hours freed up — usable for either more output or other strategic work.

Your team's current output
4
4
Typical: 6-10 hours for a 1,500-word piece
8 hrs
8
2 hrs
Typical with proper implementation: 60-75%. Without: 15-25%.
65%
AI-enabled potential
2.9×
Monthly content output potential
Current pieces/month 12
AI-enabled pieces/month 35
Current hours/month spent 48 hrs
Hours saved/month 31 hrs
Equivalent FTE freed 0.2 FTE
Or: same hrs, more output +23 pieces
How the math works

What's behind the calculation

Current hours/month = (blogs × blog hrs) + (emails × email hrs). AI capture rate represents the % of first-draft work AI removes. The remaining hours (~30-40% of original) are editorial passes and judgment work that don't compress.

AI-enabled output assumes you redirect the saved hours back into producing more content at the same per-piece rate. In practice, smart teams use part of the time savings for strategy, distribution, and measurement work — but the calculator shows the theoretical maximum content lift.

For the operational version of getting this output, see how to scale marketing without hiring.
